message.content: How do I add a new disk on Fedora?

content.text: First, run lsblk to list all block devices and identify the new disk.

message.content: Ok I can see it. What next?

content.text: Mount it with: mount /dev/sdX /mnt/data — replace sdX with your actual device name.

message.content: Done. How do I make it permanent?

content.text: Add an entry to /etc/fstab. The format is: /dev/sdX  /mnt/data  ext4  defaults  0  2

message.content: How do I verify everything is working?

content.text: Run df -h to confirm the disk is mounted and the space is visible. If the entry is in /etc/fstab, it will survive a reboot.
